title: aleuritia helodoxa
intro: Aleuritia helodoxa, also known as the 'Dune Morning Glory', is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is a type of morning glory vine that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aleuritia helodoxa include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and acting as a natural antiseptic. Aleuritia helodoxa can be prepared as a tincture or tea, and is also used in herbal remedies for its potential to soothe skin irritations and infections.
